urdu transliteration text:
Ameen Kaho BachoO Children, say AmeenEnglish Transliteration
@HujjatELC

english translation text:
To say a prayer to God
I am raising my hands
O children, say Aameen.

urdu transliteration text:
Darya say abhi apnay, ammu ko bulaati hunAmeen kaho bacho
@HujjatELC
english translation text: I will call my uncle back from the river now O children, say Aameen

urdu transliteration text:
Darya se abhi apne, ammu ko bulaati hoonAmeen kaho bacho, Karne ko dua Rab se,mein haath uthaati hoon, ameen kaho bacho,ameen kaho bacho
@HujjatELC
english translation text:
I will call my uncle back from the river now O children, say Aameen
To say a prayer to God
I am raising my hands
Please, O children, say Aameen.

urdu transliteration text:
Khaimon mei taraayi ko, laane ka iraada hai,Abbas ka waada haiwaada woh nibhaengay, mein tumko bataati hunAmeen kaho bacho
Abbas has promised
O children, say Aameen
@HujjatELC
english translation text:
He wants to bring the water to our tents
I know he keeps his promise,

Such is our thirst, we cannot open our  parched lips,
I am unable to speak,
I have turned my tears into my supplication

Even if I find a little bit of water,
I will give it to Asghar to drink,
My eyes filled with tears, this is my only supplication,

urdu transliteration text:
Ai bachon yaqinan who, amu ka kadam hoga,shaane pay alam hogaAahat hai balaa kiski, mein dekh ke aati hoonAmeen kaho bacho
Let me find out whose footsteps I hear
O children, say Aameen
@HujjatELC
english translation text: O children I am sure my uncle is coming with the flag on his shoulders

I will remain restless after being separated from my uncle
I shall die weeping,
O Allah! Please hear my lamentation

She (Bibi Fatima) will come to the river (Furat) from Madina,
I shall cry out to her,
My uncle is in difficulty, I will call my grandmother

In the camp of Shabbir (a.s), there is lamentation,
the sound of weeping can be heard,
I am Sakina, I am thirsty, I am crying with everyone else around me,
I will call my uncle back from the river now,
